title: 林鄭 & 北京底牌 - Mr. Siu's  analysis on Lam's recording.

replies.msg:
I think it may be worth spending 10 minutes to watch Mr. Siu's analysis for Ms. Lam's recording!
https://youtu.be/iuz7NBFBnQ8?t=55
Not sure if you agree with the results of Mr. Siu's analysis and critically thinking....

Some ideas of Mr. Siu analysis per my undertanding of the youtube video :

1) Lam will keep arresting as long as it can, changed to long-drawn-out / protracted war ( 持久战, 消粍战..) (https://zh.wikipedia.org/wiki/%E6%B6%88%E8%80%97%E6%88%B0) at the expense of economic downturn,
2) China will jump in to help HK eocnomy when needed,
3) CPL army will not come out to HK to suppress;
4) Mr. Siu showed respect to protestors on testing out the bottom line of China.
5) etc....

Any impacts?
